---
title: "related ITensor"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# related ITensor

## Index

```{julia}
using ITensors
@doc Index
```

```{text}
"""
dim: the dim of every subspace.
id: 唯一标识符, to judge whether the index are same.
"Qubit,Site,n=1": tags of this index, which could be definite by yourself, where
    Qubit: system of qubit
    Site: the index would express a qubit site
    n=1: the first qubit site
(dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")': 区分相同的索引对象(to express output or input), because Itensor will multiplication equal index.
"""
(dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")
```

## ITensor

Compared to MPO, which is a completely quantitative tensor.

```{julia}
@doc ITensor
```

```{text}
ITensor 
ord=2 # the number of order, meaning there are two Index as follow
Dim 1: (dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")' # index, Separate rows and columns.
Dim 2: (dim=2|id=451|"Qubit,Site,n=1")
NDTensors.Dense{ComplexF64, Vector{ComplexF64}} # sepcifical matrix.
2×2
 -0.9171435002629851 + 0.2336989174957588im   …  -0.033305846289088226 - 0.3211282243740626im
 -0.10173325172253367 - 0.30640326594315254im       -0.9320905355973363 + 0.16423951279518484im
```


## MPO

```{julia}
@doc MPO
````

```{julia}
os = OpSum()
os += "Sz", 1, "Sz", 2
os += "Sz", 2, "Sz", 3
os += "Sz", 3, "Sz", 4
sites = siteinds("S=1/2", 4)
H = MPO(os, sites)
```
```
```
